params.name: Grace of Divine Dragon
params.description: In the distant past, there was an evil dragon that was banished for defying the Ultimate Divine Dragon and later sneaked into the human world to cause trouble. To subdue it, the Ultimate Divine Dragon selected a trio led by a brave hero from among the humans, and ultimately, with their help, reclaimed the traitorous dragon's head. To honor their achievements and commemorate the friendship between humans and dragons, the Ultimate Divine Dragon created this trophy as a reward and bestowed it upon  …
